mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO view_log (invitation_id, visitor_id, ip_address, user_agent, referer, view_date, view_hour, source, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.invitationId}, #{item.visitorId}, #{item.ipAddress}, #{item.userAgent}, #{item.referer}, #{item.viewDate}, #{item.viewHour}, #{item.source}, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM view_log WHERE invitation_id = #{invitationId} AND view_date = #{viewDate}
